neighborhoods.name: Escazu Centro
neighborhoods.description: Upscale suburb of San Jose with modern shopping malls, international restaurants, and excellent medical facilities
neighborhoods.character: Modern suburban, upscale, best medical access in CR

housing.predominantType: Modern condos, gated townhouse communities, luxury apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of San José. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living San José

neighborhoods.name: Santa Ana
neighborhoods.description: Growing western suburb with a mix of Tico and expat communities, good schools, and newer developments

housing.predominantType: Modern houses, townhomes, and condo complexes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to San José's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living San José

neighborhoods.name: Heredia
neighborhoods.description: University city north of San Jose with colonial center, lower costs, and vibrant student energy
neighborhoods.character: University town, affordable urban, young and cultural

housing.predominantType: Apartments, student housing, and older homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living San José

neighborhoods.name: San Rafael de Escazu
neighborhoods.description: Hillside area above Escazu known for luxury living, embassy residences, and panoramic valley views
neighborhoods.character: Luxury hillside, embassy area, exclusive expat enclave

housing.predominantType: Luxury homes, gated estates, and high-end condos

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living San José
